title: Maggie Xu Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Maggie Xu Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Maggie Xu
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’16
Senior Software Engineer, Microsoft
In the middle of the pandemic, Maggie Xu became a mother. Having completed the Align program in 2016, her roles at major tech companies helped her support her new family during that period, allowing her to maintain a balanced lifestyle.
You don’t have to be defined by other people, or pretend to be someone else you’re not. And you can still survive and thrive in this industry
Maggie Xu, MSCS ’16
Explore all Khoury Stories
